channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Exclusive: Air Zimbabwe Rebuilds Its Booking Engine Before London, in Silence
item.description: Days before its London return, Air Zimbabwe has switched on a new reservation and online booking system. It is real preparation, yet the news reached the public through a stock-market filing and a foreign partner, not its passengers, while the website sits on a maintenance page. via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Gulf Capital and the UAE–SADC Trade Corridor Explained
item.description: via Discovery Alert #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Discovery Alert

item.title: Zim pledges US$1m to fight Ebola... Govt activates full emergency response @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Gibson Nyikadzino-Zimpapers Reporter Zimbabwe has pledged US$1 million to the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention to help fight and contain the spread of the Ebola virus across the... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: Zimbabwe joins Ebola fight with US$1m pledge @HeraldZimbabwe
item.description: Gibson Nyikadzino, ZIMBABWE has pledged US$1 million to the Africa Centres for Disease Control and Prevention (Africa CDC) to support efforts to contain the spread of the Ebola virus... via The Herald #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Herald

item.title: Glamour and confusion at Miss Universe Zimbabwe 2026 finale
item.description: via Herald.co.zw #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Herald.co.zw

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
